# init(_:_:)

**Initializer**

Creates a column identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ name: String, _ type: T.Type)
```

## Parameters

- **name**: The name of a column.
- **type**: The type of the column’s elements.
title: init(_:_:)
